description: Statistics graphic built around a choropleth map of the United States. A two-color legend at top reads 'Net immigration fell' (light yellow) and 'Fell more than 50%' (orange); counties across the country are shaded accordingly, with most of the West and large areas shaded orange. Black callout labels with arrows point to metro areas and percentages: 'Seattle -31%', 'Denver metro area -72%', 'Chicago -62%', 'N.Y.C. metro area -65%', 'Washington, D.C. -44%', 'L.A. -67%', 'El Paso -95%', 'Dallas -52%', 'Miami -32%'. Below the map, in large navy serif type, is 'Net Immigration FELL In Every Metro Area in 2025', attributed to 'New York Times', with a small White House engraving at the bottom. Posted as a repost of White House content.
notable_text: Net immigration fell / Fell more than 50% / Net Immigration FELL In Every Metro Area in 2025 / New York Times / El Paso -95%
